pages.text: Before you can melt anything, the $(l)Part Press$() cuts parts from wood and flint. Press a pick head, two handles, and a binder from logs, then drop all four parts into a crafting grid together.$(br2)The parts sort themselves — $(l)no shape to memorize$().
pages.title: No Forge Required

pages.text: Hover any smithery tool:$(br2)- Hold $(l)Shift$() for stats, parts, modifiers and synergies$(br)- Hold $(l)Shift + Ctrl$() for every parameter$(br2)Durability, mining speed and damage all come from the parts you chose. There is no such thing as a plain iron pickaxe — only *your* pickaxe.
pages.title: Reading a Tool
